summary: Bump ComfyUI v0.27.0 -> v0.28.0 across node_lock.json (core tag+commit, frontend/template pins), system_dependencies.json (LOCAL engine), the mpi-ci build-context lock copy, and the Builder COMFYUI_REF (that half is MPI-183, retarget 0.27.0 -> 0.28.0). Drivers: a node gated at 0.28 that the Krea2 edit/inpaint work needs (it runs on the Krea2 1.2 identity-edit LoRA we already ship - no new weight; user has a video with the details), plus 0.28's more optimized int8/int4 paths and the Turing black-image fix on quantized models. Apply the pin rule first (memory project_comfyui_bump_cadence): research the exact minor every near-term node needs and pin to the HIGHEST floor - one bump per wave. Ships as ONE dev image bundled with MPI-341 (single CI dispatch at 0.17.0-dev, BOTH legs), which also gives MPI-340's dev IMAGE tag path its first real proof. Feature wiring is NOT in this card. Full detail in brief.md.

SCOPE CORRECTED (user checked the video, 2026-07-23): the Krea2 storyboard/inpainting capability is NOT gated on ComfyUI core. It is 'Krea2 Edit (grounded)' (grounding_px + system_prompt) from comfyui-krea2edit - a node we ALREADY ship, pinned at 17af8833 - driving the krea2_identity_edit_v1_2 LoRA and qwen3vl_4b_fp8_scaled CLIP we already ship. If our pin lacks the grounded variant that is a node_lock commit bump ONLY (installRequirements:false = volume-resident = no image rebuild), so CHECK THAT FIRST; it may be reachable today. The 0.28 bump therefore stands on its own merits, and the real v0.28.0 notes (Comfy-Org, no breaking changes stated) rank them: Qwen3-VL tokenizer crash fixes (we ship qwen3vl_4b as both the Krea2 edit CLIP and the image describer - most relevant to us), int8/int4 work that is explicitly TURING/16xx-targeted (a LOCAL-GPU win; Pods run Ada/Blackwell so do not size this on Pod speedups), PID 1.5 model support, a text-model sampling speedup and a VAE dynamic-method AttributeError fix. Feature wiring moved out of this card entirely - it is a node-commit question, not a core-version one.
